title: helianthemum oelandicum subsp. canum
intro: Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. canum, also known as Oeland's rockrose, is a plant species belonging to the family Cistaceae, characterized by its pink to white flowers and small, oval-shaped leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Helianthemum oelandicum subsp. canum include its potential to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions and tinctures, can be used to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy and safety.
